root@mira:~# grep -i "open" -n /root/trading-agent/agent.log | tail -n 20
root@mira:~# cd /root/trading-agent

# упаковать весь файл агента в base64
base64 -w0 agent_v3_live.py > agent_v3_live.py.b64

# проверить первые символы
head -c 120 agent_v3_live.py.b64
echo
IyEvdXNyL2Jpbi9lbnYgcHl0aG9uMwppbXBvcnQgcmVxdWVzdHMsIHRpbWUsIGhtYWMsIGhhc2hsaWIsIGJhc2U2NCwganNvbiwgb3MsIHN5cywgdGhyZWFk
root@mira:~/trading-agent# cd /root/trading-agent
base64 -d agent_v3_live.py.b64 > agent_v3_live.py
chmod +x agent_v3_live.py
root@mira:~/trading-agent# systemctl restart agent
systemctl status agent --no-pager
● agent.service - Trading Agent v3
     Loaded: loaded (/etc/systemd/system/agent.service; enabled; preset: enabled)
     Active: active (running) since Tue 2026-04-14 10:45:07 UTC; 18ms ago
   Main PID: 28023 (python3)
      Tasks: 1 (limit: 1171)
     Memory: 224.0K (peak: 1.0M)
        CPU: 6ms
     CGroup: /system.slice/agent.service
             └─28023 /usr/bin/python3 -u /root/trading-agent/agent_v3_live.py

Apr 14 10:45:07 mira systemd[1]: Started agent.service - Trading Agent v3.
root@mira:~/trading-agent# cd /root/trading-agent
base64 -w0 agent_v3_live.py > agent_v3_live.py.b64
root@mira:~/trading-agent# cd /root/trading-agent
base64 -w0 agent_v3_live.py
@mira:~/trading-agent#
